fn innerX_naga_oil_vrt_XNVXWIX(arg: f32) -> f32 {
    return (arg * 3f);
}

fn innerX_naga_oil_mod_XNVXWIX(arg_1: f32) -> f32 {
    return (arg_1 * 2f);
}

fn outerX_naga_oil_mod_XNVXWIX() -> f32 {
    let _e1: f32 = innerX_naga_oil_vrt_XNVXWIX(1f);
    return _e1;
}

fn top() -> f32 {
    let _e0: f32 = outerX_naga_oil_mod_XNVXWIX();
    return _e0;
}
